title: neverfake's Low Health Warning
description: A simple low health warning mod with fully customizable sounds and thresholds.
body:
neverfake's Low Health Warning Mod is a lightweight Fabric client side mod that plays a warning sound (fully customizable) whenever your health drops under a configurable threshold. The settings for this mod can be customized using the Mod Menu Mod, such as the health threshold, volume, pitch, and warning behaviour, and cooldown. 

## What is this for? 
I made this mod to help me in PvP, since I often forget to heal, and split second awareness matters. The audio alert helps you realize when you really need to heal so you don't quick drop. Especially when you are hyper focused on the combat.

Low Health Warning also works well for normal survival gameplay, for example bossfights, and other situations. 



# Dependencies
## Required:
## https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
## Optional: 
## https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu

A release for FORGE versions will be uploaded soon. Aswell as older minecraft versions for both FORGE and FABRIC
This mod is fully client-side and does not affect gameplay mechanics or require server-side installation.

**_place this mod in your mods folder for installation._**
